name: Integrity Student Trnsprtn
fmcsa_address: 1026 W White Horse Pike, Egg Harbor, NJ 08215
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue (not directly verified; FMCSA MCS-150 / loadconnect.io reports operations start date 2005-04-03 for Integrity Transportation LLC; NJ DEP grant proposal confirms NJ LLC operating at Egg Harbor City)
notes: Address matches input (1026 W White Horse Pike, Egg Harbor City, NJ 08215). DBA 'Integrity Bus' (integritybus.net). Power_units in SAFER reflects MCS-150 self-reported figure (6) — likely understated relative to operating school bus fleet (company markets larger fleet; Chamber of Commerce lists 11-50 employees); use with caution. Safety Rating Satisfactory (rated 2005-06-16; last reviewed 2012-12-04).

name: Dufour Tours
officers: Dufour family (William D. Dufour and John Dufour founders; per company history)
registry_source: MA Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (entity exists as 'Dufour Escorted Tours Inc' per third-party listings; exact incorporation date not directly verified)
notes: Address exactly matches input (133 South St, Hinsdale, MA 01235). Legal name DUFOUR ESCORTED TOURS INC; DBA 'Dufour Tours'. Family-owned school bus + motor coach operator in Western Mass / Southern VT; family business roots in CT date to 1963 (Dufour Brothers Inc.). Safety rating Satisfactory (dated 2009-04-02). Reported ~$20.9M revenue / 27 employees per D&B / SBA records.

name: Chief School Bus Svc
registry_source: Nebraska Secretary of State Corporate / Business Services (founding year 1982 reported by D&B / BBB; SOS entity not directly verified online)
notes: Address matches input exactly. Legal name CHIEF SCHOOL BUS SERVICE INC; DBA 'Chief'. FMCSA safety rating Conditional (rated 2024-07-15 following compliance review 2024-05-20); 11 inspections in last 24 months with elevated 54.5% vehicle OOS rate vs ~22% national avg; one tow-away crash. Reported ~$3.57M revenue and ~65 employees. NE SOS entity status presumed active given operating status and continued contracts.

name: Goldstar Transit
officers: Subsidiary of Student Transportation of America (STA)
registry_source: Texas Comptroller / Texas SOS (Goldstar Transit Inc is a TX entity and STA subsidiary; exact TX SOS file number/inc date not directly verified)
notes: Legal name on USDOT 2356208 is STUDENT TRANSPORTATION OF AMERICA INC with DBA GOLDSTAR TRANSIT INC; the SAFER physical address is STA's Bastrop, TX hub (1081 Lovers Lane) rather than the listed Fort Worth yard (10251 Warehouse Way, Fort Worth, TX 76179). 692 power units / 655 drivers reflect TX-wide STA/GoldStar combined intrastate operations across multiple yards (Fort Worth, Saginaw, Burleson, White Settlement, Bastrop, etc.), not just the Fort Worth location. Began serving White Settlement ISD in 2017. Operating status Active; no FMCSA safety rating assigned. Use with caution: this USDOT may overstate the Fort Worth-only fleet.

name: MBG Enterprises Inc
registry_source: Maryland SDAT / Business Express (company founding 1987 per company website + D&B; exact MD SDAT Department ID not directly verified online)
notes: Address matches input exactly. Legal name MBG ENTERPRISES INC, family-owned school bus + refuse contractor serving Howard and Anne Arundel Counties. Company website states founded 1987 with 75+ school buses and 50+ garbage trucks (consistent with FMCSA's 102 power units total across both fleets). Operating status Active; no FMCSA safety rating. NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire — purely intrastate / private operations.
